form.formComment: Freshened for 30 days. Last start finished fourth in a small field at Plumpton on March 9 over 4100m, 11 len behind Valadon with 70.5kg at $5. Start before finished fourth in a small field at this track on February 22 over 3500m, on a wet track; 31 len behind Queenie St Clair with 72.5kg at $11. Only needs to jump well to be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Last run finished sixth of 14 runners at Newbury on March 20 over 4900m, 22 len behind Kosasiempre with 74.5kg at $6. Start before finished 11th of 15 runners at Wincanton on February 25 over 4000m, 27 len behind Laughing John with 75.5kg at $7.50. Can do better this time.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up ran last at Wincanton on February 25 over 4000m, 57 len behind Laughing John carrying 75.5kg at $10. Last start ran last at Taunton on March 24 over 3800m, 33 len behind Khafre carrying 71.5kg at $15. Happy to overlook until we see some form.

form.formComment: Last start to post a big 7 len win. This track on March 27 over 3500m defeating Juggernaut with 73kg at $3.30 in a hurdle. The start before that; pulled up at Doncaster on February 27 over 3900m. Can add to the recent impressive result.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made a bad mistake at the third from last hurdle.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign 5 of 7 runners at Aintree December 26 over 4000m, 15 len behind Analiese carrying 67.5kg at $9. When resuming last campaign 2 in a small field at Plumpton November 3 over 4100m, 4 len behind Jackstell carrying 71kg at $9. Worth including.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 40 days. First-up after three months finished ninth of 12 runners at Doncaster on February 27 over 3900m, 78 len behind Diamond Koda carrying 71kg at $11. Previously second-up won by 1.0 len Huntingdon on November 11 over 4100m defeating Mistral Blue carrying 71kg at $4.50 in a hurdle. Fitter but needs to improve sharply.
